name: Presentations
postCreateCommand: if [ -f /workspaces/Presentations/vendor/SyncDeck-Reveal/js/package.json ]; then cd /workspaces/Presentations/vendor/SyncDeck-Reveal/js && npm install; fi
postStartCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory /workspaces/Presentations || true; git config --global --add safe.directory /workspaces/Presentations/vendor/SyncDeck-Reveal/js || true
